title: Bond Valuation Desk: Yield & Price Analysis
briefing: Meridian Capital Partners manages a $2.8 billion fixed-income portfolio. The head of credit research has asked you to price a newly issued 10-year corporate bond from Apex Manufacturing (rated BBB) and analyze its return profile. The bond has a $1,000 face value and pays semiannual coupons. The market requires a yield to maturity of 6.25% for bonds of this risk profile. Your task is to compute the bond price, current yield, capital gains yield, and yield to call (the bond is callable after 5 years at $1,050). Prepare a brief memo for the portfolio manager with your findings.
learningObjectives: Compute bond price given coupon rate, YTM, and maturity
Calculate current yield and capital gains yield
Compute yield to call for a callable bond
Explain the relationship between coupon rate, YTM, and bond price
